---
title: "LSEG Tick History"
page-layout: article
---

# LSEG Tick History

**Provider:** LSEG

## Description

Historical intraday market data source with time-and-sales, quotes, and market-depth data for futures. Supports high-frequency finance and market microstructure research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Request Required, Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives

## Access notes

email to request access: business.reference@yale.edu

## Links

- [Access resource](https://guides.library.yale.edu/LSEG_Tick_History)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
